holdings.infoBox: EMDV is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Suzhou TFC Optical Communication stock at 2.81%, INTERCONEXION ELECTRICA at 2.77%, Wistron at 2.65%, NAURA Technology Group at 2.44%, and Hankook Tire & Technology at 2.41%.

overview.description: The ProShares MSCI Emerging Markets Dividend Growers ETF (EMDV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EM Dividend Masters index. The fund tracks an index composed of companies in the MSCI Emerging Markets Index that have consistent dividend growth for seven years. EMDV was launched on Jan 25, 2016 and is issued by ProShares.
